# makeTextLarger(_:)

**Instance Method**

Action method that increases the text size by one unit.

## Declaration

```swift
@IBAction @MainActor func makeTextLarger(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object that sent this message.

## Changing the Text Size

- **canMakeTextLarger**: A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made larger.
- **canMakeTextSmaller**: A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made smaller.
- **makeTextSmaller(_:)**: Action method that reduces the text size by one unit.
